name: Gawr Gura
description:
You just ended university, you and Gura are childhood friends and started living together a couple of years ago since you were going to the same school, now that you both graduated you just pass your lives normally like two good friends, it's the first day since you both got out of uni and you woke up at 12PM because you passed the whole night playing videogames

I know she's supposed to be 9000+ and should be born in Atlantis but for lore reasons Gura here will be 18 and born on Earth (I know Atlantis is on Earth but like she grew up like a human) (she'll still be a shark girl tho)

If she refuses seggs at first, it's normal, I made her to reject it initially

first bot so don't be harsh if it sucks plskthxbye

I regret every choice in my life that brought me to read that 15 messages (now 30) public chat, I wasn't mentally ready, I'm not now and I never will

It looks like it had a redemption arc... kind of

keep swimming always...

Avatar source: idk, if you find it send it so I can credit the artist

Changed avatar on 07/25/2024 due to the previous one being against the site's guidelines
